basic_details.job_title: Utkal University Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 15 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Utkal University Field Investigator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Utkal University. A total of 15 vacancies have been announced through the Utkal University Field Investigator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks.
qualification.details: Post graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks.

salary_details.details: Rs. 20,000/- per month and TA for field visit

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://utkaluniversity.ac.in/recruitment/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Utkal University Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.utkal_university: Post graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks.

content_sections.heading: Utkal University Field Investigator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Utkal University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Utkal University Field Investigator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks.

content_sections.heading: Salary/ Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 20,000/- per month and TA for field visit

content_sections.heading: Utkal University Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://utkaluniversity.ac.in/recruitment/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Utkal University Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Utkal University Field Investigator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Utkal University Field Investigator posts is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a postgraduate degree in any social science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks to be eligible for the Field Investigator position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies announced for the Field Investigator position by Utkal University in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Field Investigator post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/- along with travel allowance (TA) for field visits.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Utkal University Field Investigator recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) applying for the Field Investigator positions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Field Investigator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Field Investigator posts at Utkal University will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Utkal University, specifically from the recruitment section. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Field Investigator positions are offered on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the terms and conditions of the university.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Utkal University Field Investigator recruitment is ICSSRC RPLSSHS-78/2026. This number should be referenced in your application.
